rubric_expression: enhancing the long-chain ACTIVE CARRIER capacity (Vmax) closes the PFDoDA root and grain (the carrier overcomes the anion-exclusion ceiling) => support; the carrier cannot reach it => refute

panel.basis: 5x Vmax reaches root 62/69 and grain 46/46 -- the carrier overcomes exclusion.
straw ~2x over and the enhancement is illustrative, but the direction (carrier-limited) is clear and literature-consistent.

chief.basis: Decisive: the active carrier (Vmax) overcomes the anion-exclusion ceiling the GHK route cannot. At ~5x base Vmax (20->100) the 2-pool reaches PFDoDA root 62 vs 69 and grain 46 vs 45.5 (straw 102 vs 50, ~2x over) -- so the longest-chain residual is an active-carrier-capacity limit, closable. SCOPE: in-sample, straw ~2x over, and the ~5x enhancement is a long-chain-specific lever (not yet QSPR-derived).
